args.query:
SELECT oldvalue__c AS agent_id, COUNT(*) AS transfers
FROM casehistory__c
WHERE field__c ILIKE '%owner%'
  AND createddate >= '2022-04-10' AND createddate < '2023-04-10'
  AND oldvalue__c IS NOT NULL AND oldvalue__c <> newvalue__c
GROUP BY oldvalue__c
ORDER BY transfers ASC
LIMIT 100;

exec_args.sql:
SELECT oldvalue__c AS agent_id, COUNT(*) AS transfers
FROM casehistory__c
WHERE field__c ILIKE '%owner%'
  AND createddate >= '2022-04-10' AND createddate < '2023-04-10'
  AND oldvalue__c IS NOT NULL AND oldvalue__c <> newvalue__c
GROUP BY oldvalue__c
ORDER BY transfers ASC
LIMIT 100;

args.query:
WITH owner_events AS (
  SELECT ch.caseid__c AS case_id, ch.oldvalue__c AS agent, ch.createddate
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE ch.field__c ILIKE '%owner%'
    AND ch.createddate >= '2022-04-10' AND ch.createddate < '2023-04-10'
  UNION
  SELECT ch.caseid__c AS case_id, ch.newvalue__c AS agent, ch.createddate
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE ch.field__c ILIKE '%owner%'
    AND ch.createddate >= '2022-04-10' AND ch.createddate < '2023-04-10'
  UNION
  SELECT c.id AS case_id, c.ownerid AS agent, c.createddate
  FROM "Case" c
  WHERE c.createddate >= '2022-04-10' AND c.createddate < '2023-04-10'
),
handled AS (
  SELECT agent, COUNT(DISTINCT case_id) AS handled_cases
  FROM owner_events
  WHERE agent IS NOT NULL AND agent <> ''
  GROUP BY agent
),
transfers AS (
  SELECT oldvalue__c AS agent, COUNT(*)::int AS transfers
  FROM casehistory__c
  WHERE field__c ILIKE '%owner%'
    AND createddate >= '2022-04-10' AND createddate < '2023-04-10'
    AND oldvalue__c IS NOT NULL AND oldvalue__c <> newvalue__c
  GROUP BY oldvalue__c
)
SELECT h.agent AS agent_id, COALESCE(t.transfers,0) AS transfers, h.handled_cases
FROM handled h
LEFT JOIN transfers t ON t.agent = h.agent
WHERE h.handled_cases > 0
ORDER BY transfers ASC, h.agent ASC
LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql:
WITH owner_events AS (
  SELECT ch.caseid__c AS case_id, ch.oldvalue__c AS agent, ch.createddate
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE ch.field__c ILIKE '%owner%'
    AND ch.createddate >= '2022-04-10' AND ch.createddate < '2023-04-10'
  UNION
  SELECT ch.caseid__c AS case_id, ch.newvalue__c AS agent, ch.createddate
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE ch.field__c ILIKE '%owner%'
    AND ch.createddate >= '2022-04-10' AND ch.createddate < '2023-04-10'
  UNION
  SELECT c.id AS case_id, c.ownerid AS agent, c.createddate
  FROM "Case" c
  WHERE c.createddate >= '2022-04-10' AND c.createddate < '2023-04-10'
),
handled AS (
  SELECT agent, COUNT(DISTINCT case_id) AS handled_cases
  FROM owner_events
  WHERE agent IS NOT NULL AND agent <> ''
  GROUP BY agent
),
transfers AS (
  SELECT oldvalue__c AS agent, COUNT(*)::int AS transfers
  FROM casehistory__c
  WHERE field__c ILIKE '%owner%'
    AND createddate >= '2022-04-10' AND createddate < '2023-04-10'
    AND oldvalue__c IS NOT NULL AND oldvalue__c <> newvalue__c
  GROUP BY oldvalue__c
)
SELECT h.agent AS agent_id, COALESCE(t.transfers,0) AS transfers, h.handled_cases
FROM handled h
LEFT JOIN transfers t ON t.agent = h.agent
WHERE h.handled_cases > 0
ORDER BY transfers ASC, h.agent ASC
LIMIT 1;
